languages.text: {n}Тело магоса гудит громче, механические плечи вздрагивают.{/n} "Задваивание мехадендрита уникальной конфигурации указывает на ошибку в расчетах. Ищу причины. Дайте мне... шесть десятых секунды".

traits.locale_text: {n}Тело магоса гудит громче, механические плечи вздрагивают.{/n} "Задваивание машинного духа механодендрита уникальной конфигурации указывает на ошибку в расчетах. Ищу причины. Дайте мне... шесть десятых секунды".

languages.text: {n}The Magos's body hums louder still, his mechanical shoulders shuddering.{/n} "The duplication of a mechadendrite of unique configuration indicates a calculation error. Searching for the causes. Allow me... 0.6 seconds."
languages.original_text: {n}Тело магоса гудит громче, механические плечи вздрагивают.{/n} "Задваивание мехадендрита уникальной конфигурации указывает на ошибку в расчетах. Ищу причины. Дайте мне... шесть десятых секунды".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Magos's body hums louder still, his mechanical shoulders shuddering.{/n} "The duplication of a mechadendrite of unique configuration indicates a calculation error. Searching for the causes. Allow me... 0.6 seconds."

{n}The Magos's body hums louder still, his mechanical shoulders shuddering.{/n} "The duplication of a mechadendrite of unique configuration indicates a calculation error. Searching for the causes. Allow me... 0.6 seconds."

{n}The Magos's body hums louder still, his mechanical shoulders shuddering.{/n} "The duplication of a mechadendrite of unique configuration indicates a calculation error. Searching for the causes. Allow me... 0.6 seconds."

languages.text: {n}贤者体内的嗡鸣声愈发响亮，他的机械肩膀战栗起来。{/n}“独特构型的机械触须出现复制现象，这表明计算出现错误。正在追查原因。请稍等……0.6秒。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos's body hums louder still, his mechanical shoulders shuddering.{/n} "The duplication of a mechadendrite of unique configuration indicates a calculation error. Searching for the causes. Allow me... 0.6 seconds."

traits.locale_text: {n}贤者体内的嗡鸣声愈发响亮，他的机械肩膀战栗起来。{/n}“独特构型的机械触须出现复制现象，这表明计算出现错误。正在追查原因。请稍等……0.6秒。”

languages.text: {n}Le corps du magos se met à vrombir plus fort et ses épaules mécaniques frémissent.{/n} « La duplication d'une mécadendrite à la configuration unique indique une erreur de calcul. Recherche des causes. Accordez-moi... 0,6 seconde. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos's body hums louder still, his mechanical shoulders shuddering.{/n} "The duplication of a mechadendrite of unique configuration indicates a calculation error. Searching for the causes. Allow me... 0.6 seconds."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le corps du magos se met à vrombir plus fort et ses épaules mécaniques frémissent.{/n} « La duplication d'une mécadendrite à la configuration unique indique une erreur de calcul. Recherche des causes. Accordez-moi... 0,6 seconde. »

languages.text: {n}Magos'un vücudu daha yüksek bir sesle uğulduyor, mekanik omuzları titriyor.{/n} "Benzersiz yapılandırmaya sahip bir mekadentritin kopyalanması, hesaplama hatasına işaret eder. Sebep aranıyor. Bana... 0,6 saniye müsaade edin."
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos's body hums louder still, his mechanical shoulders shuddering.{/n} "The duplication of a mechadendrite of unique configuration indicates a calculation error. Searching for the causes. Allow me... 0.6 seconds."

traits.locale_text: {n}Magos'un vücudu daha yüksek bir sesle uğulduyor, mekanik omuzları titriyor.{/n} "Benzersiz yapılandırmaya sahip bir mekadentritin kopyalanması, hesaplama hatasına işaret eder. Sebep aranıyor. Bana... 0,6 saniye müsaade edin."

languages.text: {n}El cuerpo del magos zumba aún más fuerte, sacudiendo sus hombros mecánicos.{/n} «La duplicación de una mecadendrita de configuración única indica un error de cálculo. Buscando causas. Concédame... 0,6 segundos».
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos's body hums louder still, his mechanical shoulders shuddering.{/n} "The duplication of a mechadendrite of unique configuration indicates a calculation error. Searching for the causes. Allow me... 0.6 seconds."

traits.locale_text: {n}El cuerpo del magos zumba aún más fuerte, sacudiendo sus hombros mecánicos.{/n} «La duplicación de una mecadendrita de configuración única indica un error de cálculo. Buscando causas. Concédame... 0,6 segundos».

languages.text: {n}Der Körper des Magos summt noch lauter und seine mechanischen Schultern zittern.{/n} "Die Duplizierung eines einzigartigen Mechadendriten deutet auf einen Berechnungsfehler hin. Suche nach den Ursachen. Gebt mir ... 0,6 Sekunden."
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos's body hums louder still, his mechanical shoulders shuddering.{/n} "The duplication of a mechadendrite of unique configuration indicates a calculation error. Searching for the causes. Allow me... 0.6 seconds."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Körper des Magos summt noch lauter und seine mechanischen Schultern zittern.{/n} "Die Duplizierung eines einzigartigen Mechadendriten deutet auf einen Berechnungsfehler hin. Suche nach den Ursachen. Gebt mir ... 0,6 Sekunden."

languages.text:
{n}マゴスの身体はさらに激しく震え、機械的な肩が激しく震える。{/n}
「独特の構成を持つメカデンドライトの複製は計算ミスを示す。原因の探索中。許してくれ…0.6秒。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos's body hums louder still, his mechanical shoulders shuddering.{/n} "The duplication of a mechadendrite of unique configuration indicates a calculation error. Searching for the causes. Allow me... 0.6 seconds."
